title: NCCS Notification 2026 - Walk-in interview for 06 Junior Research Fellow, Project Technical Support Posts
description: The National Centre for Cell Science (NCCS) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 06 Project Associate I, Project Research Scientist II, Project Technical Support III, and Junior Research Fellow Jobs. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.E./B. Tech, B. Pharm, Any Degree, Post-graduation, Ph.D., can apply for the NCCS Notification 2026. The int...
